texto: In the 18th century, people began to adopt the radical new idea that love should be the most fundamental reason for marriage and that young people should be free to choose their marriage partners independently.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jardine Libaire sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. texto: She likes the mystery of that changeover, those fifteen minutes of sundown when the streets and trees and people and parked cars are delicate and immediate, every sound and smell and movement amplified by the lowest light or the lightest darkness. Even a city that’s broken and dirty can, in that time, be divine and intimate.
explicacao: Citação de Jardine Libaire sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “She likes the mystery of that changeover, those fifteen minutes of sundown when the streets and t…” articula espiritualidade, city, evening em registro de espiritualidade, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

frase_original: She likes the mystery of that changeover, those fifteen minutes of sundown when the streets and trees and people and parked cars are delicate and immediate, every sound and smell and movement amplified by the lowest light or the lightest darkness. Even a city that’s broken and dirty can, in that time, be divine and intimate.

texto: As filthy as any night was, a New York City morning is always clean. The eyes get washed.Flowers in white deli buckets are replenished. The population bathes, in marble mausoleums of Upper East Side showers, or in Greenwich Village tubs, or in the sink of a Chinatown one-bedroom crammed with fifteen people. Some bar opens and the first song on the jukebox is Johnny Thunders, while bums pick up cigarette butts to see what’s left to smoke. The smell of espresso and hot croissants. The weather vane squeaks in the sun. Pigeons are reborn out of the mouths of blue windows.
explicacao: Citação de Jardine Libaire sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “As filthy as any night was, a New York City morning is always clean. The eyes get washed.Flowers …” articula sucesso, city, morning em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e boa-noite.
